name: Chicken Breasts Southwestern
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 9-inch square baking pan, stir together all marinade ingredients.
2. Add chicken breasts; marinate, turning once, in refrigerator for at least 45 minutes. Meanwhile, prepare grill by placing coals on one side and heating until they are ash white. Make an aluminum foil drip pan and place it opposite the coals.
3. Remove chicken from marinade and drain. Grill chicken for 7 minutes, then turn. Continue grilling until fork tender, about 6 to 8 minutes.
4. Top each chicken breast with 2 slices cheese. Continue grilling until cheese begins to melt.
5. Serve with salsa.
